title: Shabake
titleNative: しゃばけ
synopsis: Ichitarou, the frail yet sharp-minded master of Nagasakiya, rarely leaves his estate—but he’s far from alone. Gifted with the ability to see spirits, he’s protected by ghostly companions like Hakutaku and Inugami. One night, he slips out and witnesses a brutal murder. Soon after, Edo is plagued by a series of eerie murders. As fear grips the city, Ichitarou and his spirits must uncover the culprit. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Poppoya-san: Nonki Kikanshi
titleNative: ポッポやさん のんき機関士
synopsis: A second commissioned movie by the Japanese National Railways for new-hires. This time it follows a carefree engineer's mistake while driving a train.

title: Poppoya-san: Nonki Ekichou
titleNative: ポッポやさん のんき駅長
synopsis: A commissioned movie by the Japanese National Railways for new-hires. It shows how a carefree station master almost causes an accident between two trains.

title: Gendai Goyaku
titleNative: 現代誤訳
synopsis: The series focuses on teaching students famous quotations from historical figures from all over the world by presenting the quotations incorrectly at first as "mistranslations" in the "modern day" encouraging the students to learn the correct quotes in the process. (Source: Crunchyroll)

tags.name: Educational

title: Honkai: Star Rail — Sparkling Tricks
titleNative: 崩坏：星穹铁道 花火把戏
synonyms: 崩壊：スターレイル 花火トリック
synopsis: This world's just like a big non-stop circus showcasing beasts brawling all day and night: bears on unicycles, lions leaping through fire hoops, monkeys juggling bowls... Me, I'm happy being a side character in the background, cheering on those who have the limelight. Then, at the climax of the performance... bang! Sparkling like fireworks into brilliant colors— You think the leading character would dare do this? (Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

title: KING OF PRISM -Your Endless Call- Minna Kirameke! Prism☆Tours
titleRomaji: KING OF PRISM -Your Endless Call- Minna Kirameke! Prism☆Tours
titleNative: KING OF PRISM-Your Endless Call-み～んなきらめけ！プリズム☆ツアーズ
synopsis: This time King of Prism is "Prism☆Tours"! Shin Ichijou and the other six members of SePTENTRION will travel across time and worlds in a time machine to the origins of Prism Shows. It will cross the boundaries of the series and intertwine with the worlds of the "Pretty Rhythm" series, "PriPara" series , "Kiratto Pri☆Chan", and "Waccha PriMagi!" to deliver a sparkling Prism☆Tours. Fated boy meets boy, our worlds are now connected by the prism's sparkle! (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Star Wars: Visions Volume 3
titleNative: スターウォーズビジョンズ Volume 3
synopsis: The critically-acclaimed series of animated shorts returns to Japan for a third installment in collaboration with nine anime studios. 1) The Duel: Payback (Mizuno Takanobu, Kamikaze Douga x Anima) 2) The Song of Four Wings (Hiroyasu Kobayashi, Project Studio Q) 3) The Ninth Jedi: Child of Hope (Naoyoshi Shiotani, Production I.G.) 4) The Bounty Hunters (Junichi Yamamoto, Wit Studio) 5) Yuko's Treasure (Masaki Tachibana, Kinema Citrus) 6) The Lost Ones (Hitoshi Haga, Kinema Citrus) 7) The Smuggler (Masahiko Ootsuka, Trigger) 8) The Bird of Paradise (Tadahiro Yoshihira, Polygon Pictures) 9) Black (Shinya Oohira, David Production)

title: Genshin Impact: The Song Burning in the Embers
titleEnglish: Genshin Impact: The Song Burning in the Embers
titleNative: 原神 燼中歌
synopsis: Some believe that growing up is to gradually break free from the shackles. Fate sets the most brutal rules for us, turning day into night, leaving the future dwelling in but the lingering warmth of dreams. Thus, our weapons clash, burying the remnants of another setting sun, and welcoming the next rising dawn. Then, when the cage shatters, once and for all— May gentle flames envelop the shriveled flowers, with their song echoing in the embers.

title: Wujin Shenyu
titleNative: 无尽神域
synopsis: Seven years ago, the family of the mortal prince Li Han was killed by seven immortals. When he was dying, he and his sister Li Yao were saved by the legendary Endless God Realm. Seven years later, Li Han returned. In order to wake up his sister, he must constantly improve his cultivation according to the requirements of the God Realm to protect the people. At the same time, he also vowed to find the murderer of that year and take revenge! But things are more complicated than he imagined. As the truth is revealed bit by bit, Li Han must make a choice between revenge and gratitude...

title: Sam to Chip no Hachamecha Dai Race
titleRomaji: Sam to Chip no Hachamecha Dai Race
titleNative: サムとチップのハチャメチャ大レース
synonyms: Sam and Chip's Great Messy Race
synopsis: The Hari Hari Island Adventure Rally is just about to start! Hello Kitty, Mimmy, Little Twin Stars, Keroppi, and other Sanrio favorites have gathered in fantastical cars for an endurance race around the island’s many obstacles. Tuxedo Sam and Chip think their vehicle has what it takes to win the checkered flag, but after a late start and a few unfortunate accidents, can this plucky duo survive the odds and pull off a victory? (Source: Sanrio Wiki) Note: Released for VHS alongside "Kero Kero Keroppi no Daibouken: Fushigi na Mame no Ki (けろけろけろっぴの大冒険 ふしぎな豆の木)"

title: Detective Conan vs. Kid the Phantom Thief

synopsis: The movie contains cuts from episodes featuring the confrontations between Conan and Kid the Phantom Thief: “Conan vs. Kid the Phantom Thief” and “The Detectives Come Together! Kudo vs. Kid the Phantom Thief”. From birth of the Moonlight Magician, Kid the Phantom Thief, and the first encounter between the greatest and eternal rival Conan / Shinichi, this is a special compilation film of TV series with new footage!

tags.name: Detective

title: ANOTHER WORLD
titleNative: 世外
synopsis: While helping lost souls to get reborn, the spirit Gudo meets a girl called Yuri. He embarks on a 1,000-year journey to help her through her various incarnations to remove her Seed of Evil, a kernel within her that turns her into a monstrous Wrath if she gets consumed by anger. He learns that helping her find self-forgiveness for the tragic loss of her brother is the only way to save her.
